channel.title: software on Welcome weary traveler
channel.description: Recent content in software on Welcome weary traveler

item.title: Site V2
item.description: Channeling my inner dev, I’ve gone ahead and completely re-written this site. Original post for comparison. Why? The original site was… poorly written. It used React, which can be fine, but was honestly totally overkill for a site that wasn’t complex or really that interactive. And I’ve had a change of heart when it comes to SPAs: that they’re useful when they’re useful, and not when they’re not. Free Hosting this site is still basically free via Github pages (except for the domain name), and the way hugo generates the CSS bundles is predictable, so even though I’m do clean builds when I add content, if it doesn’t change the existing CSS then the generated CSS gets the exact same name, which means it can live in peoples caches longer.
